title: Action plans, fluid navigation, versioning
features: Action plan checklists — generate a step-by-step plan for any idea, on demand, from its cleaned transcript
Pull down on Library to refresh — and to pick up new app updates when one is live
Install prompt with tailored steps for iPhone and Android
improvements: Swiping between tabs now follows your finger in real time and springs back, instead of only reacting on release
Tab transitions slide in the direction you're moving
NoirPro Light is now the only weight used across the app
The Dumpty wordmark is flame-orange everywhere it appears
Sign-in screen simplified: no card border, guest option moved to a small underlined link, smaller overall footprint
Added subtle entrance motion to Library, Account, and empty states
fixes: The bottom tab bar no longer mis-positions when the Library search keyboard is open

title: Initial release
features: Record voice ideas and get a clean, titled, segmented transcript back
Guest mode — try it without an account, notes stay on-device
Guest-to-account migration when you sign in
Library with search, tags, and pinning
Offline recording queue that syncs when back online
